overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in an orange jumpsuit exploring a post-apocalyptic settlement at night. The character walks through narrow stone passages, an open muddy market area, enters a wooden building, and ascends to an elevated metal walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley with scaffolding and stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow stone alley toward a tunnel archway

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera toward the foreground

entered.detail: rough stone wall with weathered texture running along the left side
metal chain link fence attached to the stone wall with posters
industrial metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks
steep wooden staircase ascending along the right wall
wooden signpost with directional arrows and text
stone archway entrance leading to a covered passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone alleyway at night, passing by scaffolding and a wooden staircase on the right. The environment is enclosed with artificial lighting, and a single NPC walks past in the opposite direction.

events.description: character enters the covered tunnel archway from the open alley
emerging from tunnel into darker open area with night sky visible

agents.ego_description: passing through the short tunnel passage toward the open area beyond

entered.detail: metal handrails lining both sides of the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a brief covered tunnel section with metal railings, transitioning from the enclosed alley to an open area. The lighting shifts as the character approaches the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy settlement area with makeshift market stalls

events.description: exits tunnel into wide open muddy area with scattered structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the open settlement area, navigating around muddy patches and makeshift structures

notable_agents.action: standing near a wooden fence in the distance

entered.detail: muddy dirt ground with scattered debris and wooden planks
metal staircase with railings leading to an upper level
rough wooden fence marking the boundary of the area
tall wooden scaffolding structure with hanging banners
wooden market stalls with various goods and tarps
wooden log barriers and crates stacked along the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open muddy area of the settlement, passing by makeshift market stalls and scaffolding with banners. The ground is dirt with wooden barriers on the right, and a few NPCs are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden building entrance with string lights

events.description: character enters the wooden building through the lit doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a wooden building, passing an NPC standing by the doorway

notable_agents.action: standing guard or waiting by the building entrance

entered.detail: wooden structure with open doorway emitting warm interior light
decorative string lights hanging along the building facade
small wooden shed or storage structure with tarp roof

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden building entrance decorated with string lights, passing an NPC standing by the door. The character then enters the building, transitioning from the outdoor settlement to an indoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor room with shelves and animal skull decoration

events.description: character begins ascending metal stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior room and climbing metal stairs to an elevated platform

entered.detail: enclosed room with wooden walls and warm artificial lighting
wooden shelving units with various items and supplies
large animal skull mounted on the back wall as decoration
wooden workbench with tools and items on the surface
industrial metal staircase with rusted railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: Inside the wooden building, the character moves through a room with shelves, a workbench, and an animal skull decoration on the wall. The character then begins ascending a metal staircase to reach an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway overlooking the settlement

events.description: emerging onto elevated outdoor walkway with view of settlement below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated metal walkway, overlooking the settlement area below

entered.detail: metal grating walkway with rusted railings at height above ground
metal barriers and dividers along the walkway edges
overhead view of the muddy settlement and market area below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated metal walkway with rusted railings, providing an overhead view of the settlement below. The walkway has industrial barriers and metal grating flooring as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic stone alleyway into a sprawling settlement before ascending to an elevated industrial vantage point. It begins by following the character through a narrow, artificially lit passage past scaffolding and a wooden staircase, moving through a brief covered tunnel that bridges the gap to the outdoors. As the character emerges, the environment opens into a wide, muddy market area filled with makeshift stalls and banners under the night sky. The scene then shifts inward as the character passes string lights to enter a wooden building, moving past a workbench and wall decorations before ascending a metal staircase. Finally, the camera reaches an elevated metal walkway with rusted railings, providing a high-angle view of the settlement below.
